topic: Definition and Importance of Kalmatu Shahadah

subUnits.title: 4.1 Meaning and Implications of Kalmatu Shahadah (First Part)
notes: • It is the Islamic declaration of faith
• The foundation and first pillar of Islam
أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ
Ash-hadu an la ilaha illallah wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadar Rasulullah
I bear witness that there is no god but Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah
This lesson focuses on the FIRST PART
• There is no true god worthy of worship except Allah
• No one has the right to be worshipped except Allah
• All worship must be directed to Allah alone
• 'La ilaha' - rejection of all false gods
• Denial of worship to anything besides Allah
• 'Illallah' - affirmation that only Allah deserves worship
فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
So know that there is no deity except Allah
وَإِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
And your god is one God. There is no deity except Him
شَهِدَ اللَّهُ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
Allah witnesses that there is no deity except Him
• Not just saying words without understanding
• Not reject any part of it
• Not for show or worldly gain
• Must be truthful in saying it
• Belief that Allah is the only Creator
• Allah is the only Controller of universe
• Direct all acts of worship to Allah
• Pray, fast, give charity only for Allah
• Believe in Allah's Names and Attributes
مَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ
Whoever says La ilaha illallah will enter Paradise
بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
Islam is built upon five: the testimony that there is no god but Allah...
• La ilaha illallah is the foundation of Islam
• Must be understood, believed, and acted upon
• It is the key to Paradise
• Must be accompanied by good deeds

subUnits.youtubeQuery: La ilaha illallah meaning conditions SSS1 IRS site:youtube.com

quiz.explanation: Shahadah (شهادة) means testimony or witness - the declaration of faith in Islam.

quiz.q: The first part of Shahadah is:
quiz.explanation: The first part is 'La ilaha illallah' (There is no god but Allah).
'La ilaha' is the negation - rejecting all false gods and objects of worship.
'Illallah' is the affirmation - establishing that only Allah deserves worship.

quiz.q: The verse 'So know that there is no deity except Allah' is in Surah:
quiz.explanation: This verse is in Surah Muhammad (47:19).

quiz.q: One condition of La ilaha illallah is:
quiz.explanation: Al-Ilm (Knowledge) is one of the seven conditions - understanding the meaning.

quiz.q: The number of conditions of Shahadah is:
quiz.explanation: There are seven conditions: Knowledge, Certainty, Acceptance, Submission, Sincerity, Truthfulness, and Love.
Tawhid al-Uluhiyyah is the oneness of worship - worshipping Allah alone.

quiz.q: The Prophet said whoever says La ilaha illallah will:
quiz.explanation: The Hadith states that whoever says La ilaha illallah will enter Paradise.
It requires understanding the meaning, believing in it with certainty, and acting upon its requirements.

subUnits.title: 4.2 Importance and Benefits of Kalmatu Shahadah
notes: • First and most important pillar of Islam
• Gateway to Islam - without it, no one is Muslim
Islam is built upon five pillars
• Entry to Paradise is through Shahadah
• Last words before death determine outcome
• Those who die upon it enter Paradise
وَلَا يَمْلِكُ الَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ الشَّفَاعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِالْحَقِّ
And those whom they invoke besides Him do not possess intercession; except for those who testify to the truth
حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ عَلَى النَّارِ مَنْ قَالَ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
Allah has forbidden the Fire for whoever says La ilaha illallah
• Heaviest on the Scale of Good Deeds
أَفْضَلُ الذِّكْرِ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
The best remembrance is La ilaha illallah
أَفْضَلُ مَا قُلْتُ أَنَا وَالنَّبِيُّونَ مِن قَبْلِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
The best that I and the Prophets before me have said is: La ilaha illallah
• Wipes away sins when said sincerely
• Purifies from shirk and major sins
Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured
• Shahadah is declaration of this purpose
وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me
• Life and property protected in Islam
• Saying Shahadah without action is not enough
• Must be accompanied by good deeds
• Must avoid major sins and shirk
مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا التَّوْرَاةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا
The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey
• Shahadah is the foundation of Islam
• Brings benefits in this world and hereafter
مَنْ مَاتَ وَهُوَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ
Whoever dies knowing that there is no god but Allah will enter Paradise

quiz.q: Shahadah is the ______ pillar of Islam:
quiz.explanation: Shahadah is the first and most important pillar of Islam.

quiz.q: Shahadah is described as the key to:
quiz.explanation: Shahadah is the key to Paradise - whoever dies upon it enters Paradise.

quiz.q: The verse 'By the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured' is in Surah:
quiz.explanation: This verse is in Surah Ar-Ra'd (13:28).
The Hadith states that Allah has forbidden the Fire for whoever says La ilaha illallah.
The Prophet said the best remembrance is La ilaha illallah.
Shahadah requires worshipping Allah alone, without any partners.
Surah Adh-Dhariyat (51:56) states we were created only to worship Allah.

quiz.q: Whoever dies knowing La ilaha illallah will:
quiz.explanation: The Hadith states that whoever dies knowing La ilaha illallah will enter Paradise.
Shahadah unites all Muslims as brothers regardless of race, color, or nationality.
Shahadah must be accompanied by sincere belief and good deeds; mere words are not enough.
